results.rendered_html: metron. of the eighth Manu (son of the Sun by Su-varṇā q.v., and therefore younger brother of the seventh Manu or Vaivasvata; the succeeding Manus to the twelfth, or accord. to other authorities to the fourteenth inclusive, are all called Sāvarṇi; cf. dakṣa-, brahma-, dharma-s˚),  Hariv. ;  MārkP.

sāvarṇi (patron. von savarṇa) m. N. pr. eines Ṛṣi  ṚV. 10,62,11 .  ĀŚV. ŚR. 12,10,10 .  MBH. 2,292  (˚gālavau). 293  (sāvarṇa 110 ). 5,3789 . 13,692 .  R. 4,43,50 . gaṇa kārtakaujapādi (sāvarṇimāṇḍūkeyau) zu  P. 6,2,37 .  SAṂSK. K. 183,b,11 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 55,b,41 . 56,a,2 .  BHĀG. P. 12,7,3 . 5 . Bez. eines Manu  HARIV. 410  (sāvarṇa die neuere Ausg.). 452 .  VP. 266. fg.   MĀRK. P. 53,8 . 80,3 . 106,14 .  BHĀG. P. 6,6,39 . 8,13,10. fg. 
— Vgl. indra˚, dakṣa˚, deva˚, dharma˚, brahma˚, meru˚ (auch  MBH. 2,2573 ), rudra˚, hema˚.
